member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Entities.AccountPayment
member.summary: A payment posted against an by SalesStaff on behalf of the organisation. Payments start in Pending status and only affect once a Management or SystemAdmin user moves them to Verified.
member.remarks: Status lifecycle: Pending → Verified | Voided. Voiding requires a mandatory reason and is restricted to Management and SystemAdmin roles. A PaymentVerified or PaymentVoided notification is dispatched to the CorporateManager on each transition. The PostgreSQL balance trigger fires on Verified and Voided transitions to keep consistent.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.AccountPayment.OrgAccountId
member.summary: The account this payment is applied to.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.AccountPayment.AmountGbp
member.summary: The amount received in GBP. Always positive.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.AccountPayment.PaymentMethod
member.summary: How the payment was made. Drives the information required at entry (e.g. bank reference for BankTransfer, cheque number for Cheque).

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.AccountPayment.Status
member.summary: Approval state of the payment. Only Verified payments reduce the organisation's outstanding balance.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.AccountPayment.Reference
member.summary: Payment reference supplied by the organisation (e.g. bank transfer reference, cheque number). Used for reconciliation.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.AccountPayment.Notes
member.summary: Free-text notes recorded by SalesStaff at time of entry.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.AccountPayment.VerifiedBy
member.summary: of the user who verified the payment.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.AccountPayment.VerifiedAt
member.summary: UTC timestamp at which the payment was verified.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.AccountPayment.VoidReason
member.summary: Mandatory explanation when voiding a payment. Must be provided by the Management or SystemAdmin user performing the void action.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.AccountPayment.OrgAccount
member.summary: Navigation to the account this payment belongs to.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.AccountPayment.Allocations
member.summary: Invoice allocations that distribute this payment across invoices.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Entities.AccountStatement
member.summary: An immutable point-in-time snapshot of an 's transaction history, generated on demand by Management or SalesStaff.
member.remarks: Unlike most entities this does not extend because it carries only generation metadata, not update-tracking columns. The statement content is stored as a JSON document in so that the exact figures presented to the customer are preserved regardless of subsequent data changes.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.AccountStatement.OrgAccountId
member.summary: The account this statement was generated for.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.AccountStatement.GeneratedAt
member.summary: UTC timestamp at which the statement was generated.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.AccountStatement.GeneratedBy
member.summary: of the user who triggered statement generation.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.AccountStatement.StatementJson
member.summary: JSON document containing the full statement detail — opening balance, itemised invoices, payments, and closing balance — as it stood at . Stored as jsonb in PostgreSQL.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.AccountStatement.OrgAccount
member.summary: Navigation to the account this statement belongs to.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Entities.AggregateRoot
member.summary: Base class for aggregate roots. Extends with domain event collection so that handlers can publish side-effects after the transaction commits.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Entities.AppUser
member.summary: Core identity record that bridges a Cognito user account with the FSBS domain model. Every authenticated user — staff and customer alike — has exactly one AppUser row.
member.remarks:
Two distinct Cognito pools feed this table:
Staff pool — users federated from Microsoft Entra ID. The Post-Confirmation Lambda creates the AppUser row and assigns the AppRole by mapping the user's Entra group membership.
Customer pool — private customers and corporate users registered via invitation. The AppRole is carried in the invitation and written by the same Post-Confirmation Lambda.
The record is tenant-scoped so that staff (root tenant) and customers (their organisation's tenant) are logically separated at query time.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.AppUser.TenantId
member.summary: Identifies the tenant this user belongs to. Staff always carry the school's root tenant ID; customers carry their organisation's tenant ID.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.AppUser.CognitoSub
member.summary: The sub claim from the user's Cognito JWT. Immutable once set; used to look up the AppUser on every authenticated request.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.AppUser.Email
member.summary: The user's email address as held in Cognito. For staff this originates from Entra ID; for customers it is the address used during registration.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.AppUser.AppRole
member.summary: The user's primary application role, which drives all authorization policy decisions. Set at registration and updated by the Token Refresh Lambda when an Entra group change is detected for staff users.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.AppUser.Profile
member.summary: Personal details for this user.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.AppUser.OrgMemberships
member.summary: Corporate organisation memberships. A user may belong to at most one active organisation in the current implementation, but the schema allows for future multi-org support.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Entities.AuditableEntity
member.summary: Extends with four audit columns that are stamped automatically by AuditInterceptor on every write.
member.remarks: CreatedAt and CreatedBy are set once on insert and never updated. UpdatedAt and UpdatedBy are refreshed on every subsequent save. All four columns are stored as timestamptz / uuid in the database. Entities that should not be mutated after creation (e.g. ) extend directly rather than this type.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.AuditableEntity.CreatedAt
member.summary: UTC timestamp of the row's initial insert.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.AuditableEntity.UpdatedAt
member.summary: UTC timestamp of the most recent update to this row.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.AuditableEntity.CreatedBy
member.summary: of the user whose action caused the insert. null for system-generated rows (e.g. seeded reference data).

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.AuditableEntity.UpdatedBy
member.summary: of the user whose action caused the most recent update. null for system-generated rows.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Booking
member.summary: The central aggregate of the FSBS domain. Represents a customer's or staff member's reservation of simulator time, together with all associated slots, pricing, approvals, and notes.

remarks.para: State machine — external customers: Provisional (15-min hold) → Confirmed → InProgress → Completed → Invoiced. A provisional booking expires automatically if not confirmed within the hold window.

State machine — InternalStudent: PendingApproval (slot reserved, no expiry) → Confirmed | Rejected. InternalStudent bookings never enter Provisional and are exempt from all discount rules; the staff rate applies exclusively.
Price immutability: , , and are set once when the booking transitions to Confirmed. They must not be recalculated or overwritten thereafter.
Idempotency: the UUID is required on every POST /bookings request via the Idempotency-Key header. A unique index on this column allows safe client retries without creating duplicate bookings.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Booking.BookedBy
member.summary: of the user who created the booking. For corporate bookings this may be a CorporateManager booking on behalf of their organisation's students.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Booking.OrgId
member.summary: Organisation on whose account this booking will be invoiced. null for private customer or InternalStudent bookings.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Booking.BookerRole
member.summary: of the user at the time of booking. Determines which state machine path is followed and which pricing rules apply.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Booking.TrainingType
member.summary: Whether this is a Flight Deck or Cabin Crew session. Constrains the eligible simulator configurations, instructor assignments, and student capacity limits.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Booking.ConfigurationId
member.summary: The simulator configuration selected for this booking. Determines the applicable and maximum capacity.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Booking.StudentCount
member.summary: Number of students attending the session. Must be ≥ 1, ≤ 4 for Flight Deck bookings, and ≤ 10 for Cabin Crew bookings. Enforced by domain validators and PostgreSQL CHECK constraints.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Booking.Status
member.summary: Current lifecycle state of the booking.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Booking.GrossPriceGbp
member.summary: Pre-discount total price in GBP. Set at confirmation; null before the booking is confirmed. Never recalculated after confirmation.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Booking.DiscountGbp
member.summary: Total discount applied in GBP. Set at confirmation; null before confirmation or when no discount applies.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Booking.NetPriceGbp
member.summary: Final invoiceable amount in GBP (GrossPriceGbp − DiscountGbp). Set at confirmation; null before confirmation.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Booking.DepartmentName
member.summary: The internal cost centre charged for this booking. Mandatory for InternalStudent bookings; null otherwise.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Booking.BudgetCode
member.summary: Internal budget code for financial reporting. Mandatory for InternalStudent bookings; null otherwise.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Booking.IdempotencyKey
member.summary: Client-supplied UUID that guarantees exactly-once semantics for booking creation. Sourced from the Idempotency-Key HTTP header. A unique database index prevents duplicate rows even under concurrent retries.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Booking.Configuration
member.summary: Navigation to the simulator configuration selected for this booking.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Booking.Slots
member.summary: The one or more time slots reserved in a simulator bay for this booking.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Booking.Notes
member.summary: Internal notes attached to this booking by staff.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Booking.Discounts
member.summary: Immutable discount snapshots written at confirmation. One entry per that was applied.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Booking.Approval
member.summary: Approval record created when the booking enters PendingApproval. Only present for InternalStudent bookings.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Entities.BookingApproval
member.summary: Records the SalesStaff or SystemAdmin decision (approve or reject) on an InternalStudent booking that entered PendingApproval state. One approval record exists per booking; it is created when the booking is submitted and updated when the reviewing user acts on it.

remarks.para: Self-approval ban: cannot equal . This is enforced in the command handler and reinforced by the ck_booking_approvals_no_self_approval CHECK constraint in the database.
Rejection reason: when is , must be provided and must be at least 10 characters. Enforced by the ck_booking_approvals_rejection CHECK constraint.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.BookingApproval.BookingId
member.summary: The booking this approval record belongs to.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.BookingApproval.RequestedBy
member.summary: of the InternalStudent who submitted the booking. Used to enforce the self-approval ban.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.BookingApproval.ReviewedBy
member.summary: of the SalesStaff or SystemAdmin user who acted on the approval. null while the decision is still .

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.BookingApproval.ReviewedAt
member.summary: UTC timestamp at which the reviewing user made their decision.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.BookingApproval.Decision
member.summary: The outcome of the review. Starts as Pending; transitions to Approved (booking moves to Confirmed) or Rejected (slot released, InternalStudent notified with reason).

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.BookingApproval.RejectionReason
member.summary: Mandatory explanation when is . Must be at least 10 characters. Included in the rejection notification email to the InternalStudent.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.BookingApproval.Booking
member.summary: Navigation to the booking under review.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Entities.BookingDiscount
member.summary: An immutable audit snapshot of a single applied to a at the point of confirmation. One row is written for each rule that contributed to the final price; the records are never updated or deleted.

remarks.para: Because this entity is write-once it does not inherit from and carries no UpdatedAt, UpdatedBy, or IsDeleted columns. EF Core is configured with PropertySaveBehavior.Throw on every property to prevent any accidental modification after the initial insert.
The and values are snapshots taken at confirmation time. Even if the source is later modified or deleted, these figures remain correct for audit and invoice purposes.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.BookingDiscount.BookingId
member.summary: The booking this discount was applied to.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.BookingDiscount.DiscountRuleId
member.summary: The discount rule that was applied. Stored as a FK for traceability; the actual percentage and amount are snapshotted on this record.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.BookingDiscount.DiscountType
member.summary: Category of the discount at the time of application. Snapshotted so that reports remain accurate if the rule's type is later changed.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.BookingDiscount.DiscountPct
member.summary: Percentage reduction that was applied (0–100), snapshotted from the rule at confirmation time.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.BookingDiscount.DiscountAmountGbp
member.summary: Actual monetary value of the discount in GBP. Derived from applied to the booking's gross price at confirmation time.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.BookingDiscount.CreatedAt
member.summary: UTC timestamp at which the booking was confirmed and this record was written.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.BookingDiscount.Booking
member.summary: Navigation to the parent booking.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.BookingDiscount.DiscountRule
member.summary: Navigation to the source discount rule.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Entities.BookingNote
member.summary: An internal note attached to a by a staff member. Notes are visible only to staff and are used to record context such as special requirements, customer communications, or operational concerns.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.BookingNote.BookingId
member.summary: The booking this note belongs to.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.BookingNote.AuthorId
member.summary: of the staff member who wrote the note.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.BookingNote.Body
member.summary: The note content. Plain text; displayed in the booking detail view.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.BookingNote.Booking
member.summary: Navigation to the parent booking.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Entities.BookingSlot
member.summary: A specific time block reserved in a for a . The bay-time uniqueness constraint prevents double-booking; the duration constraint enforces the minimum 4-hour session rule.
member.remarks:
Minimum duration: must be ≥ 240 (4 hours). Enforced by BookingSlotValidator in the application layer and by the ck_booking_slots_min_duration CHECK constraint at the database level.
Double-booking prevention: a filtered unique index on (bay_id, start_at, end_at) where slot_status != 'Cancelled' allows the same time window to be reused after cancellation without a physical delete.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.BookingSlot.BookingId
member.summary: The booking this slot belongs to.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.BookingSlot.BayId
member.summary: The simulator bay where the session will take place.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.BookingSlot.InstructorId
member.summary: Instructor assigned to deliver this session. null until an instructor is scheduled. Assignment requires the instructor's to include the parent booking's .

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.BookingSlot.StartAt
member.summary: UTC start time of the session.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.BookingSlot.EndAt
member.summary: UTC end time of the session.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.BookingSlot.DurationMins
member.summary: Duration in minutes. Must be ≥ 240. Stored explicitly rather than derived from / to simplify constraint enforcement and reporting queries.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.BookingSlot.SlotStatus
member.summary: Current status of the slot within the session lifecycle.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.BookingSlot.Booking
member.summary: Navigation to the parent booking.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.BookingSlot.Bay
member.summary: Navigation to the reserved simulator bay.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.BookingSlot.Instructor
member.summary: Navigation to the assigned instructor, if any.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Course
member.summary: A structured training programme comprising an ordered set of s and s. Students are linked to a course via and progress through it lesson by lesson.
member.remarks: Courses are tenant-scoped — a corporate organisation's courses are invisible to other tenants. The determines whether the course is for Flight Deck or Cabin Crew training, which in turn constrains which simulator configurations are eligible for its sessions.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Course.Name
member.summary: Display name of the course shown to students and instructors.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Course.Description
member.summary: Optional overview or objectives for the course.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Course.TrainingType
member.summary: Whether this is a Flight Deck or Cabin Crew training programme. Restricts the simulator configurations that can host sessions for this course.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Course.Modules
member.summary: The ordered set of modules that make up this course.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Course.Enrolments
member.summary: All student enrolments on this course.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Entities.DiscountRule
member.summary: A threshold-based discount rule attached to a . Rules are evaluated at booking confirmation and the resulting deduction is snapshotted as an immutable .
member.remarks:
Evaluation algorithm:
Collect all rules whose thresholds are satisfied by the booking.
Sort by descending.
Apply the highest-priority rule. If it is , also sum all other combinable rules below it.
Cap the total discount at the maximum discount ceiling configured on the policy.
Staff (InternalStudent) bookings are exempt — no discount rules apply.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.DiscountRule.PricingPolicyId
member.summary: The pricing policy this rule belongs to.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.DiscountRule.DiscountType
member.summary: Category of discount (e.g. volume-based, advance-booking, corporate negotiated). Determines which threshold fields in are evaluated.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.DiscountRule.Priority
member.summary: Evaluation order when multiple rules match. Higher number wins. Among rules at equal priority, combinable rules are summed.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.DiscountRule.DiscountPct
member.summary: Percentage reduction applied to the base price (0–100).

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.DiscountRule.IsCombinable
member.summary: When true this rule can be stacked with other combinable rules. When false it is applied exclusively — no other rule is combined with it even if other combinable rules are present.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.DiscountRule.ThresholdJson
member.summary: JSON document containing the rule's eligibility criteria (e.g. {"minSessions": 5} for a volume rule, or {"minDaysAhead": 30} for an advance-booking rule). Stored as jsonb; interpreted by the pricing service at confirm time.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.DiscountRule.PricingPolicy
member.summary: Navigation to the pricing policy this rule belongs to.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Enrolment
member.summary: Links a student to a and tracks their overall progress through it. A unique constraint on (user_id, course_id) ensures a student can only be enrolled once per course at a time.
member.remarks: Status lifecycle: Active → Completed | Withdrawn | Suspended. Completed is set by a CourseDirector once all lessons have a . Withdrawn or Suspended can be applied administratively without affecting the lesson history.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Enrolment.UserId
member.summary: The student enrolled on the course.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Enrolment.CourseId
member.summary: The course the student is enrolled on.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Enrolment.Status
member.summary: Current progress state of the enrolment.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Enrolment.CompletedOn
member.summary: The calendar date on which the enrolment was marked Completed. null while the enrolment is still active.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Enrolment.User
member.summary: Navigation to the enrolled student.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Enrolment.Course
member.summary: Navigation to the enrolled course.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Enrolment.ProgressRecords
member.summary: Sign-off records for each lesson the student has completed.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Entities.EntityBase
member.summary: Root base type for all domain entities. Provides a surrogate primary key that maps to a PostgreSQL uuid column with a uuid_generate_v4() default.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.EntityBase.Id
member.summary: Surrogate primary key. Generated by the database on insert; never reassigned. The concrete column name (e.g. booking_id) is set per entity in its Fluent API configuration.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Instructor
member.summary: A staff member authorised to conduct simulator sessions. An instructor's eligibility for a booking depends on their intersecting the booking's training type.
member.remarks: Before assigning an instructor to a , the handler must verify that the instructor's list contains the booking's . This check is also enforced in the GET /instructors?trainingType= query so the UI only presents eligible instructors to the scheduler.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Instructor.UserId
member.summary: The account of this instructor. Must hold the AppRole.Instructor role.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Instructor.TrainingTypeRatings
member.summary: Training types this instructor is rated to deliver. Stored as a native PostgreSQL training_type[] array. An instructor may hold ratings for Flight Deck, Cabin Crew, or both. Assigning an instructor to a session whose type is absent from this list is a domain error.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Instructor.User
member.summary: Navigation to the user account.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Instructor.Availabilities
member.summary: Declared availability and leave windows used by the scheduler to identify eligible instructors for a given slot.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Instructor.BookingSlots
member.summary: Booking slots to which this instructor has been assigned.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Entities.InstructorAvailability
member.summary: A declared time window indicating whether an is available to deliver sessions, is on leave, or has another commitment. Used by the scheduling service to filter eligible instructors when a is being assigned.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.InstructorAvailability.InstructorId
member.summary: The instructor this window applies to.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.InstructorAvailability.StartAt
member.summary: UTC start of the availability window.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.InstructorAvailability.EndAt
member.summary: UTC end of the availability window.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.InstructorAvailability.AvailabilityType
member.summary: Indicates whether this window represents available time (), approved leave (), or another commitment (). Only Available windows make the instructor eligible for session assignment.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.InstructorAvailability.Notes
member.summary: Optional free-text note (e.g. leave type, external commitment description).

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.InstructorAvailability.Instructor
member.summary: Navigation to the instructor this window belongs to.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Invitation
member.summary: An invitation to register on the FSBS platform as a corporate customer. Issued by SalesStaff (for ) or by a CorporateManager (for ) within their own organisation.

remarks.para: Token security: the raw invitation token is a cryptographically random value emailed to the invitee. Only the SHA-256 hex digest is stored in ; the raw token is never persisted. The Pre Sign-up Lambda re-hashes the presented token and compares against this column.

Uniqueness: a partial unique index on (invitee_email, org_id) where status = 'Pending' ensures only one active invitation exists per address per organisation, while still permitting re-invitation after expiry or revocation.
Expiry: invitations expire after 7 days by default. A nightly Lambda sweeps for expired rows and sets their status to Expired.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Invitation.OrgId
member.summary: The organisation the invitee will join on registration.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Invitation.InviteeEmail
member.summary: Email address of the person being invited.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Invitation.InviteeRole
member.summary: The role the invitee will receive within the organisation on registration. A CorporateManager may only issue invitations and only for their own org.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Invitation.TokenHash
member.summary: SHA-256 hex digest of the raw invitation token. Fixed-length 64-character string stored in a char(64) column with a unique constraint. The raw token is delivered solely via email and never stored.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Invitation.Status
member.summary: Current state of the invitation: Pending (awaiting registration), Claimed (registration complete), Expired (7-day window elapsed), or Revoked (cancelled by an authorised user).

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Invitation.ExpiresAt
member.summary: UTC timestamp after which this invitation can no longer be used.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Invitation.ClaimedBy
member.summary: of the newly registered user who claimed this invitation. Populated only when is Claimed.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Invitation.ClaimedAt
member.summary: UTC timestamp at which the invitation was claimed.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Invitation.RevokedBy
member.summary: of the user who revoked this invitation. Populated only when is Revoked.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Invitation.RevokedAt
member.summary: UTC timestamp at which the invitation was revoked.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Invitation.Organisation
member.summary: Navigation to the target organisation.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Invoice
member.summary: A billing document raised against an for a completed or invoiced . Issued by SalesStaff once a session reaches the Invoiced booking status.

remarks.para: Balance calculation: contributes to when the invoice status is Issued or Overdue. The PostgreSQL balance trigger (update_org_balance) fires on every insert/update/delete to keep the running total current.
Net constraint: net_gbp = gross_gbp − discount_gbp is enforced by the ck_invoices_net CHECK constraint at the database level.
Row-level security in PostgreSQL restricts invoice visibility to the owning organisation's tenant.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Invoice.BookingId
member.summary: The booking this invoice was raised for.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Invoice.OrgId
member.summary: The organisation billed by this invoice.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Invoice.InvoiceNumber
member.summary: Human-readable invoice reference displayed on the document and in the customer portal (e.g. "INV-2024-00142").

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Invoice.Status
member.summary: Current status in the invoice lifecycle: Draft → Issued → Paid | Overdue | Voided. Only Issued and Overdue invoices contribute to the organisation's outstanding balance.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Invoice.GrossGbp
member.summary: Total pre-discount amount in GBP.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Invoice.DiscountGbp
member.summary: Total discount applied in GBP.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Invoice.NetGbp
member.summary: Final invoiceable amount in GBP (GrossGbp − DiscountGbp). Enforced by ck_invoices_net CHECK constraint.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Invoice.IssuedOn
member.summary: The calendar date on which the invoice was issued to the organisation.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Invoice.DueOn
member.summary: Payment due date. Invoices past this date are marked Overdue.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Invoice.Booking
member.summary: Navigation to the booked session.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Invoice.Organisation
member.summary: Navigation to the billed organisation.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Invoice.Allocations
member.summary: Payment allocations that partially or fully settle this invoice.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ISoftDeletable
member.remarks: Retaining deleted rows satisfies the seven-year data-retention requirement and preserves referential integrity for audit trails and invoices. To query deleted records intentionally, call IgnoreQueryFilters() on the IQueryable.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ISoftDeletable.IsDeleted
member.summary: true when the record has been logically deleted. Rows where this flag is set are excluded from all standard queries via a global filter.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ITenantScoped
member.summary: Marks an entity as belonging to a specific tenant. Applied to , , and .
member.remarks: A global EF Core query filter restricts every query to rows whose matches the value from the current request's JWT (ICurrentUser.TenantId). Staff users always operate under the school's root tenant ID so they can see all customer data. PostgreSQL row-level security enforces the same isolation at the storage layer via SET LOCAL app.current_tenant_id.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ITenantScoped.TenantId
member.summary: Identifier of the tenant that owns this record. Derived from the tenant_id claim in the authenticated user's JWT and injected into DbContext by middleware before any handler executes.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Lesson
member.summary: A single deliverable training session within a . When a student completes a lesson an instructor or CourseDirector creates a to sign it off.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Lesson.ModuleId
member.summary: The module this lesson belongs to.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Lesson.Name
member.summary: Display name of the lesson (e.g. "Emergency Descent Procedure").

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Lesson.SequenceOrder
member.summary: 1-based position within the parent module. Lessons are presented in ascending SequenceOrder.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Lesson.DurationMins
member.summary: Standard duration of this lesson in minutes. Used when building a booking slot for the session; the actual must be at least 240 minutes regardless of the lesson's own duration.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Lesson.Module
member.summary: Navigation to the parent module.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Entities.MaintenanceWindow
member.summary: A scheduled maintenance or downtime period for a . During this window the unit's bays are blocked and the calendar renders them as dark grey (non-selectable).

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.MaintenanceWindow.SimulatorUnitId
member.summary: The simulator unit that is unavailable during this window.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.MaintenanceWindow.StartAt
member.summary: UTC start of the maintenance period.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.MaintenanceWindow.EndAt
member.summary: UTC end of the maintenance period.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.MaintenanceWindow.Reason
member.summary: Optional description of the work being performed (e.g. "Scheduled annual software update", "Motion platform bearing replacement").

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.MaintenanceWindow.SimulatorUnit
member.summary: Navigation to the simulator unit being maintained.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Module
member.summary: A chapter or unit within a , grouping related s into a logical progression block.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Module.CourseId
member.summary: The course this module belongs to.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Module.Name
member.summary: Display name of the module (e.g. "Phase 1 — Normal Procedures").

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Module.SequenceOrder
member.summary: 1-based position within the course. Modules are presented to students in ascending SequenceOrder; earlier modules must typically be completed before later ones are unlocked.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Module.Course
member.summary: Navigation to the parent course.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Module.Lessons
member.summary: The lessons contained within this module, ordered by .

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Entities.OrgAccount
member.summary: Financial account held for an . Tracks the credit limit, live balance, and account status used to gate new bookings.

remarks.para: Balance maintenance: is maintained exclusively by a PostgreSQL trigger (update_org_balance()) that fires after any insert, update, or delete on invoices or account_payments. Application code must never write to this column directly. EF Core is configured with ValueGeneratedOnAddOrUpdate and PropertySaveBehavior.Ignore to prevent accidental overwrites.

para.c: SUM(net_gbp WHERE invoice status IN ('Issued','Overdue')) − SUM(amount_gbp WHERE payment status = 'Verified')

remarks.para: A nightly Lambda reconciliation job cross-checks the trigger value against a full SUM query and raises a CloudWatch alarm on any discrepancy.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.OrgAccount.OrgId
member.summary: The organisation that owns this account.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.OrgAccount.CreditLimitGbp
member.summary: Maximum outstanding balance (GBP) the school will extend to this organisation before blocking new bookings. Configured by SalesStaff.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.OrgAccount.CurrentBalanceGbp
member.summary: Current outstanding balance in GBP. Positive means the organisation owes money; negative means they are in credit. Read-only from the application layer — maintained by a PostgreSQL trigger. A AccountBalanceWarning event is dispatched when this exceeds 80 % of .

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.OrgAccount.Status
member.summary: Lifecycle status of the account. A Suspended or Closed account blocks new bookings for the organisation.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.OrgAccount.Organisation
member.summary: Navigation to the owning organisation.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.OrgAccount.Payments
member.summary: All payment records posted against this account.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.OrgAccount.Statements
member.summary: Point-in-time statement snapshots generated for this account.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Organisation
member.summary: A corporate customer entity — typically an airline, charter operator, or training institution — that books simulator sessions on behalf of its staff.
member.remarks: Every Organisation has exactly one (1-to-1) that tracks the financial relationship with the school. Members are linked via rows and carry either the or role within the org. The determines which tier applies to bookings made under this org. Row-level security in PostgreSQL enforces that each org's data is visible only to its own tenant.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Organisation.Name
member.summary: Display name of the organisation as it appears on invoices and the management dashboard (e.g. "Sunrise Airlines Ltd").

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Organisation.CustomerClass
member.summary: Pricing classification that selects the applicable for this organisation's bookings. Corporate organisations typically receive negotiated rates configured on the relevant rows.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Organisation.Account
member.summary: The financial account held for this organisation.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Organisation.Memberships
member.summary: All staff members linked to this organisation.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Organisation.Invitations
member.summary: Pending, claimed, and historical invitation records issued to — or revoked for — users joining this organisation.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Entities.OrgMembership
member.remarks: A unique constraint on (user_id, org_id) prevents a user from being a member of the same organisation twice. The OrgRole here is distinct from the user's — AppRole is the system-wide authorization role, while OrgRole governs what the user can do within their corporate org (e.g. a CorporateManager has and may issue student invitations for their org).

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.OrgMembership.UserId
member.summary: The member user.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.OrgMembership.OrgId
member.summary: The organisation this membership belongs to.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.OrgMembership.OrgRole
P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.OrgMembership.User
member.summary: Navigation property to the member user.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.OrgMembership.Organisation
member.summary: Navigation property to the owning organisation.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Entities.PaymentAllocation
member.summary: Distributes a portion of an against a specific , enabling a single payment to partially or fully settle multiple invoices.
member.remarks: The FK from payment_allocations.invoice_id to invoices is added via a deferred ALTER TABLE in the DDL because invoices is defined later in the schema script. This ordering is preserved in the EF migration.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.PaymentAllocation.PaymentId
member.summary: The payment being allocated.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.PaymentAllocation.InvoiceId
member.summary: The invoice being (partially) settled.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.PaymentAllocation.AmountGbp
member.summary: The portion of the payment applied to this invoice in GBP. The sum of all allocations for a payment cannot exceed the payment's .

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.PaymentAllocation.Payment
member.summary: Navigation to the source payment.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.PaymentAllocation.Invoice
member.summary: Navigation to the invoice being settled.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Entities.PricingPolicy
member.summary: Defines the base hourly rate for a specific combination of simulator configuration, training type, and customer class, effective for a given date range. This is the starting point for all price calculations.
member.remarks: Price is calculated at booking confirmation time by selecting the most recently effective policy for the booking's (, , ) combination, then applying any applicable s. Once a is confirmed the price is locked — no recalculation occurs even if the policy changes. Staff (InternalStudent) bookings always use the staff rate and are ineligible for any discount rules.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.PricingPolicy.ConfigurationId
member.summary: The simulator configuration this rate applies to. Different aircraft types and cabin layouts carry different cost structures.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.PricingPolicy.TrainingType
member.summary: Whether this rate is for Flight Deck or Cabin Crew training. The two training types have distinct pricing even on the same configuration.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.PricingPolicy.CustomerClass
member.summary: Customer segment this rate applies to. Standard, Staff, and Corporate customers each have their own rate ladder.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.PricingPolicy.HourlyRateGbp
member.summary: Base rate in GBP per hour before any discounts are applied.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.PricingPolicy.EffectiveFrom
member.summary: The date from which this policy is active (inclusive). When multiple policies match the same key tuple the one with the latest EffectiveFrom is selected.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.PricingPolicy.EffectiveTo
member.summary: The last date on which this policy is active (inclusive). null means the policy has no planned expiry.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.PricingPolicy.Configuration
member.summary: Navigation to the simulator configuration this policy covers.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.PricingPolicy.DiscountRules
member.summary: Discount rules that can reduce the base rate for eligible bookings.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ProgressRecord
member.summary: An instructor or CourseDirector's sign-off confirming that a student has satisfactorily completed a specific within their . Once created, progress records are treated as immutable audit evidence.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ProgressRecord.EnrolmentId
member.summary: The enrolment (student + course) this record belongs to.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ProgressRecord.LessonId
member.summary: The lesson that was completed.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ProgressRecord.CompletedAt
member.summary: UTC timestamp at which the lesson was completed in the simulator.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ProgressRecord.SignedOffBy
member.summary: of the instructor or CourseDirector who signed off the student's performance. Must hold a qualifying role.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ProgressRecord.Notes
member.summary: Optional debrief notes or performance observations recorded by the signing instructor.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ProgressRecord.Enrolment
member.summary: Navigation to the parent enrolment.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ProgressRecord.Lesson
member.summary: Navigation to the lesson that was completed.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Qualification
member.summary: A named flight or cabin-crew qualification (e.g. ATPL, Type Rating, SEP). Used as reference data when recording instructor competencies and flagging upcoming expiries for regulatory compliance.
member.remarks: The QualificationExpiring notification event is dispatched 30 and 7 days before a linked qualification's expiry date so that the relevant instructor or course director can arrange renewal.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Qualification.Name
member.summary: Short, human-readable qualification name displayed in the UI and on instructor profiles (e.g. "ATPL(A)", "B737 Type Rating").

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Qualification.Description
member.summary: Optional longer description of the qualification's scope, issuing authority, or renewal requirements.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ReconfigurationSlot
member.summary: A non-billable buffer period reserved in a to allow technicians to reconfigure the simulator between two bookings that require different s.

remarks.para: Reconfiguration slots are created automatically when a booking is confirmed, if the next booking on the same bay requires a different configuration. A slot is also inserted even when there is no subsequent booking, to protect operational readiness for the next session.

Users cannot select or book these windows. The availability calendar renders them as grey-hatched blocks. A ReconfigurationAlert notification is dispatched when a reconfig window is less than 60 minutes before the next session.
is sourced from a matching ; when no template exists the fallback is .
This entity does not implement — reconfig slots are hard-deleted when their associated booking is cancelled or rejected and no longer required.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ReconfigurationSlot.BayId
member.summary: The bay in which the reconfiguration will take place.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ReconfigurationSlot.PrecedingBookingId
member.summary: The whose confirmation triggered the creation of this slot. null when the slot was inserted proactively with no preceding booking.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ReconfigurationSlot.FromConfigId
member.summary: The configuration the simulator is transitioning from.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ReconfigurationSlot.ToConfigId
member.summary: The configuration the simulator is transitioning to.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ReconfigurationSlot.StartAt
member.summary: UTC start of the reconfiguration window.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ReconfigurationSlot.EndAt
member.summary: UTC end of the reconfiguration window.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ReconfigurationSlot.DurationMins
member.summary: Duration of the reconfiguration in minutes. Sourced from or, if no template exists, from .

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ReconfigurationSlot.Bay
member.summary: Navigation to the simulator bay.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ReconfigurationSlot.PrecedingBooking
member.summary: Navigation to the booking that preceded this reconfiguration.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ReconfigurationSlot.FromConfiguration
member.summary: The configuration being transitioned from.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ReconfigurationSlot.ToConfiguration
member.summary: The configuration being transitioned to.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ReconfigurationTemplate
member.summary: Defines the turnaround duration required to switch a from one to another. One template exists per ordered config pair; the reverse direction requires its own template.
member.remarks: A unique constraint on (from_config_id, to_config_id) and a CHECK constraint ensuring from_config_id != to_config_id enforce integrity at the database level. When no matching template exists for a transition the system falls back to . The resulting time block is written as a when a booking is confirmed.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ReconfigurationTemplate.SimulatorUnitId
member.summary: The simulator unit this template applies to.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ReconfigurationTemplate.FromConfigId
member.summary: The configuration the unit is switching away from.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ReconfigurationTemplate.ToConfigId
member.summary: The configuration the unit is switching to.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ReconfigurationTemplate.DurationMins
member.summary: How many minutes the reconfiguration takes. This is the duration of the non-billable inserted between the two adjacent bookings.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ReconfigurationTemplate.SimulatorUnit
member.summary: Navigation to the owning simulator unit.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ReconfigurationTemplate.FromConfiguration
member.summary: The configuration being transitioned from.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ReconfigurationTemplate.ToConfiguration
member.summary: The configuration being transitioned to.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Report
member.summary: A named management report definition. The report's query, filters, and output format are described in and executed on demand by creating a .
member.remarks: Reports are typically created and maintained by SystemAdmin or Management users via the reporting configuration UI. Each execution produces a that is processed asynchronously by the reporting worker and stored as a file in S3 (fsbs-documents bucket), accessible via a pre-signed URL.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Report.Name
member.summary: Human-readable report name displayed in the management dashboard.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Report.Description
member.summary: Optional description of the report's purpose and intended audience.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Report.DefinitionJson
member.summary: JSON document describing the report's data source, filters, columns, groupings, and output format. Stored as a jsonb column. Interpreted by the reporting service when a run is triggered.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.Report.Runs
member.summary: All execution runs for this report.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ReportRun
member.summary: A single execution instance of a definition. Processing is asynchronous: the run is created in Queued state, picked up by the reporting worker ECS task, and transitions through Running → Completed | Failed.
member.remarks: This entity does not extend because it has no standard CreatedBy/UpdatedBy audit columns — only , , and are stored. The EF configuration maps these explicitly. On completion the output file is written to the fsbs-documents S3 bucket; the key is stored in and served to authorised users exclusively via pre-signed URLs (never via CloudFront).

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ReportRun.ReportId
member.summary: The report definition that was executed.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ReportRun.TriggeredBy
member.summary: of the user who triggered the run.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ReportRun.Status
member.summary: Current processing state: Queued → Running → Completed | Failed.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ReportRun.CreatedAt
member.summary: UTC timestamp at which the run record was created.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ReportRun.UpdatedAt
member.summary: UTC timestamp of the most recent status transition.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ReportRun.OutputS3Key
member.summary: S3 object key within the fsbs-documents bucket for the generated report file. Populated only when is Completed. Access is granted via a pre-signed URL — the bucket is never served through CloudFront.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ReportRun.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Human-readable error message captured when is Failed. Displayed to the user who triggered the run.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ReportRun.Report
member.summary: Navigation to the report definition that was executed.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ScheduleTemplate
member.summary: A reusable scheduling blueprint associated with a specific . Templates define the standard session patterns (e.g. recurring weekly blocks) that ScheduleAdmin can apply to the calendar without building each booking from scratch.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ScheduleTemplate.ConfigurationId
member.summary: The simulator configuration this template is designed for. Only bays of the owning running this configuration are eligible when the template is applied.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ScheduleTemplate.Name
member.summary: Human-readable name displayed in the template picker (e.g. "Standard B737 Week").

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ScheduleTemplate.Description
member.summary: Optional description of intended usage or session pattern.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.ScheduleTemplate.Configuration
member.summary: Navigation to the simulator configuration this template targets.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Entities.SimulatorBay
member.summary: A physical bay within a where training sessions take place. Each and targets a specific bay, and the unique index on (bay_id, start_at, end_at) prevents double-booking.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.SimulatorBay.SimulatorUnitId
member.summary: The simulator unit this bay belongs to.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.SimulatorBay.Name
member.summary: Short display name for the bay as shown on the scheduling calendar (e.g. "Bay 1", "West Wing Bay").

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.SimulatorBay.Status
P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.SimulatorBay.SimulatorUnit
member.summary: Navigation to the owning simulator unit.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.SimulatorBay.BookingSlots
member.summary: All booking slots reserved in this bay.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.SimulatorBay.ReconfigurationSlots
member.summary: Non-billable reconfiguration buffer slots in this bay. Rendered as grey-hatched on the availability calendar and cannot be selected by users.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Entities.SimulatorConfiguration
member.summary: Describes a specific hardware/software setup of a for a particular aircraft type and cabin arrangement. Configurations drive pricing, capacity limits, and reconfiguration scheduling.

remarks.para:
Capacity hard caps (enforced by both domain validators and PostgreSQL CHECK constraints):
Flight Deck sessions: max 4 students
Cabin Crew sessions: max 10 students
Training types: is a PostgreSQL training_type[] array column. A configuration may support one or both training types; bookings are only valid for types present in this list.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.SimulatorConfiguration.SimulatorUnitId
member.summary: The simulator unit this configuration belongs to.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.SimulatorConfiguration.AircraftType
member.summary: ICAO or common designation of the aircraft type this configuration simulates (e.g. "B737-800", "A320").

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.SimulatorConfiguration.ConfigMode
member.summary: Physical layout of the simulated cabin. CockpitOnly means the simulator reproduces only the flight deck; CockpitAndCabin adds a full cabin mock-up for combined flight-deck and cabin-crew training.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.SimulatorConfiguration.SupportedTrainingTypes
member.summary: Training types this configuration can host. Stored as a native PostgreSQL training_type[] array. An instructor's must intersect this list before the instructor can be assigned to a booking on this configuration.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.SimulatorConfiguration.MaxCapacityFlightDeck
member.summary: Maximum number of Flight Deck students per booking. Hard cap: 4. Enforced by ck_simulator_config_fd_capacity CHECK constraint.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.SimulatorConfiguration.MaxCapacityCabinCrew
member.summary: Maximum number of Cabin Crew students per booking. Hard cap: 10. Enforced by ck_simulator_config_cc_capacity CHECK constraint.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.SimulatorConfiguration.SimulatorUnit
member.summary: Navigation to the owning simulator unit.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.SimulatorConfiguration.ScheduleTemplates
member.summary: Schedule templates that use this configuration.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.SimulatorConfiguration.PricingPolicies
member.summary: Pricing policies that apply to bookings on this configuration.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Entities.SimulatorUnit
member.summary: The physical flight simulator device (e.g. a Full-Flight Simulator or Flight Training Device). A unit contains one or more s and can operate under different s.
member.remarks: Reconfiguring a unit from one configuration to another requires a turnaround window. The duration is sourced first from a matching ; when no template exists the fallback is .

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.SimulatorUnit.Name
member.summary: Human-readable name displayed in the scheduling calendar (e.g. "FFS-1").

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.SimulatorUnit.Location
member.summary: Optional physical location description (e.g. "Bay A, Building 3").

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.SimulatorUnit.ActiveConfigurationId
member.summary: The the unit is currently set up for. Determines which training types and pricing tiers apply to new bookings. Changes when a completes.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.SimulatorUnit.DefaultReconfigMins
member.summary: Fallback reconfiguration turnaround time in minutes used when no exists for a specific config-to-config pair.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.SimulatorUnit.ActiveConfiguration
member.summary: Navigation to the currently active configuration.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.SimulatorUnit.Configurations
member.summary: All configurations (past and present) that have been defined for this unit.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.SimulatorUnit.Bays
member.summary: The physical bays that make up this simulator unit.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.SimulatorUnit.MaintenanceWindows
member.summary: Scheduled maintenance periods during which this unit is unavailable.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Entities.UserProfile
member.summary: Mutable personal details for an . Stored in a separate table that shares the same primary key column (user_id) as app_users, making this a strict 1-to-1 optional extension row.
member.remarks: The shared PK means no separate FK column exists — the join is always user_profiles.user_id = app_users.user_id. EF Core models this via HasForeignKey<UserProfile>(p => p.Id) in AppUserConfiguration.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.UserProfile.FirstName
member.summary: Legal first name.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.UserProfile.LastName
member.summary: Legal last name / surname.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.UserProfile.PhoneNumber
member.summary: Optional contact phone number. Used for booking reminder SMS notifications when the user has opted in.

member.name: P:FSBS.Domain.Entities.UserProfile.User
member.summary: The this profile belongs to.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Events.BookingApprovedEvent
member.summary: Raised when a SalesStaff or SystemAdmin approves a PendingApproval booking. Triggers the approval email to the InternalStudent.

member.name: M:FSBS.Domain.Events.BookingApprovedEvent.#ctor(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Raised when a SalesStaff or SystemAdmin approves a PendingApproval booking. Triggers the approval email to the InternalStudent.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Events.BookingCancelledEvent
member.summary: Raised when a booking is cancelled, either by the customer or by an admin. Triggers slot release, orphaned reconfiguration slot cleanup, and cancellation notification.

member.name: M:FSBS.Domain.Events.BookingCancelledEvent.#ctor(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Raised when a booking is cancelled, either by the customer or by an admin. Triggers slot release, orphaned reconfiguration slot cleanup, and cancellation notification.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Events.BookingConfirmedEvent
member.summary: Raised when a booking transitions to Confirmed and the price is locked. Triggers the confirmation email and, for corporate bookings, an account balance check.

member.name: M:FSBS.Domain.Events.BookingConfirmedEvent.#ctor(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.Decimal)
member.summary: Raised when a booking transitions to Confirmed and the price is locked. Triggers the confirmation email and, for corporate bookings, an account balance check.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Events.BookingRejectedEvent
member.summary: Raised when a SalesStaff or SystemAdmin rejects a PendingApproval booking. Triggers the rejection email (including reason) and slot release.

member.name: M:FSBS.Domain.Events.BookingRejectedEvent.#ctor(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Raised when a SalesStaff or SystemAdmin rejects a PendingApproval booking. Triggers the rejection email (including reason) and slot release.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Events.InvitationClaimedEvent
member.summary: Raised when a corporate invitation is claimed during registration. Triggers the Post Confirmation Lambda flow to assign the user's Cognito group.

member.name: M:FSBS.Domain.Events.InvitationClaimedEvent.#ctor(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Guid,FSBS.Domain.Enums.InviteeRole)
member.summary: Raised when a corporate invitation is claimed during registration. Triggers the Post Confirmation Lambda flow to assign the user's Cognito group.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Events.SlotBookedEvent
member.summary: Raised when a booking is created and a slot is reserved (either Provisional or PendingApproval). Triggers availability cache invalidation and real-time calendar delta push via SignalR.

member.name: M:FSBS.Domain.Events.SlotBookedEvent.#ctor(System.Guid,System.Guid,FSBS.Domain.Enums.AppRole,FSBS.Domain.Enums.TrainingType,System.Guid,System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.DateTimeOffset,System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Raised when a booking is created and a slot is reserved (either Provisional or PendingApproval). Triggers availability cache invalidation and real-time calendar delta push via SignalR.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Exceptions.BookingCapacityExceededException
member.summary: Thrown when the requested student count exceeds the hard capacity cap for the booking's training type (4 for FlightDeck, 10 for CabinCrew).

member.name: M:FSBS.Domain.Exceptions.BookingCapacityExceededException.#ctor(FSBS.Domain.Enums.TrainingType,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Thrown when the requested student count exceeds the hard capacity cap for the booking's training type (4 for FlightDeck, 10 for CabinCrew).

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Exceptions.BookingConflictException
member.summary: Thrown when a requested slot overlaps an existing booking or reconfiguration window on the same bay.

member.name: M:FSBS.Domain.Exceptions.BookingConflictException.#ctor(System.Guid,System.DateTimeOffset,System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Thrown when a requested slot overlaps an existing booking or reconfiguration window on the same bay.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Exceptions.InstructorRatingMismatchException
member.summary: Thrown when an instructor is assigned to a booking whose TrainingType is not in the instructor's TrainingTypeRatings list.

member.name: M:FSBS.Domain.Exceptions.InstructorRatingMismatchException.#ctor(System.Guid,FSBS.Domain.Enums.TrainingType)
member.summary: Thrown when an instructor is assigned to a booking whose TrainingType is not in the instructor's TrainingTypeRatings list.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Exceptions.InvalidBookingStateTransitionException
member.summary: Thrown when a command attempts a booking state transition that is not permitted by the state machine (e.g. approving a Confirmed booking).

member.name: M:FSBS.Domain.Exceptions.InvalidBookingStateTransitionException.#ctor(System.Guid,FSBS.Domain.Enums.BookingStatus,FSBS.Domain.Enums.BookingStatus)
member.summary: Thrown when a command attempts a booking state transition that is not permitted by the state machine (e.g. approving a Confirmed booking).

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Interfaces.IBookingRepository
member.summary: Write-side repository for the Booking aggregate. Used by command handlers. Query-side operations (DTOs, pagination) live in the Infrastructure read model.

member.name: M:FSBS.Domain.Interfaces.IBookingRepository.FindByIdAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the booking with its Slots collection loaded.

member.name: M:FSBS.Domain.Interfaces.IBookingRepository.FindByIdempotencyKeyAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Finds a booking by its idempotency key. Returns null if no booking has been created with that key, allowing the handler to safely create one.

member.name: M:FSBS.Domain.Interfaces.IBookingRepository.FindConflictingSlotsAsync(System.Guid,System.DateTimeOffset,System.DateTimeOffset,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns all non-cancelled booking slots that overlap the given range on the specified bay. Used by the booking handler to detect conflicts before creating a new slot.

member.name: M:FSBS.Domain.Interfaces.IBookingRepository.FindNextSlotOnBayAsync(System.Guid,System.DateTimeOffset,System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the earliest non-cancelled booking slot on the bay that starts at or after , with its parent Booking loaded. is omitted from results so that a booking being cancelled within the same transaction is not returned.

member.name: M:FSBS.Domain.Interfaces.IBookingRepository.FindPrecedingSlotOnBayAsync(System.Guid,System.DateTimeOffset,System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the latest non-cancelled booking slot on the bay whose EndAt is at or before , with its parent Booking loaded. is omitted from results for the same reason as .

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Interfaces.IDomainEventDispatcher
member.summary: Dispatches domain events collected on aggregate roots after the database transaction commits. Implemented in the Application layer using MediatR.

member.name: M:FSBS.Domain.Interfaces.IInstructorRepository.ListRatedForAsync(FSBS.Domain.Enums.TrainingType,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns instructors whose TrainingTypeRatings include the given training type, for use in the booking wizard instructor selection step.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Interfaces.IInvitationRepository
member.summary: Write-side repository for the Invitation aggregate. Used by command handlers.

member.name: M:FSBS.Domain.Interfaces.IInvitationRepository.FindPendingByTokenHashAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Finds a Pending, non-expired invitation by its SHA-256 token hash. Returns null if no matching invitation exists or if it has expired/been claimed.

member.name: M:FSBS.Domain.Interfaces.IOrganisationRepository.FindWithAccountAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the organisation together with its account. Used when evaluating corporate discount eligibility and credit limits.

member.name: M:FSBS.Domain.Interfaces.IPricingPolicyRepository.FindApplicableAsync(System.Guid,FSBS.Domain.Enums.TrainingType,FSBS.Domain.Enums.CustomerClass,System.DateTimeOffset,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the pricing policy effective on the given date for the combination of configuration, training type, and customer class. Returns null if no policy is defined (configuration error).

member.name: M:FSBS.Domain.Interfaces.IPricingPolicyRepository.GetDiscountRulesAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns all active discount rules attached to the given policy, ordered by priority descending (highest priority first).

member.name: M:FSBS.Domain.Interfaces.IReconfigurationSlotRepository.FindByPrecedingBookingAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the reconfiguration slot whose PrecedingBookingId matches the given booking. Returns null if the booking had no reconfig slot attached.

member.name: M:FSBS.Domain.Interfaces.IReconfigurationSlotRepository.HasOverlapAsync(System.Guid,System.DateTimeOffset,System.DateTimeOffset,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns true if any reconfiguration slot on the bay overlaps the given half-open interval [start, end). Used to prevent bookings from being placed inside an existing reconfiguration window.

member.name: M:FSBS.Domain.Interfaces.IReconfigurationSlotRepository.Remove(FSBS.Domain.Entities.ReconfigurationSlot)
member.summary: Marks the slot for hard deletion. Reconfig slots are never soft-deleted; the change is flushed when IUnitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync is called.

member.name: M:FSBS.Domain.Interfaces.IReconfigurationTemplateRepository.FindAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
M:FSBS.Domain.Interfaces.ISimulatorRepository.FindByIdAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the unit with its Bays and ActiveConfiguration loaded.

member.name: M:FSBS.Domain.Interfaces.ISimulatorRepository.ListConfigurationsForTrainingTypeAsync(FSBS.Domain.Enums.TrainingType,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns all simulator configurations that support the given training type, ordered by aircraft type. Used to populate the booking wizard step.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.Interfaces.IUnitOfWork
member.summary: Abstracts the database commit operation so that the TransactionBehaviour can flush all pending changes without depending on EF Core directly.

member.name: M:FSBS.Domain.Interfaces.IUnitOfWork.CollectAndClearDomainEvents
member.summary: Collects all pending domain events from tracked aggregate roots and clears them so they cannot be dispatched twice. Call before so events are captured even if the save throws.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.ValueObjects.DateTimeRange
member.summary: A half-open interval [Start, End) representing a contiguous block of time. Used for booking slots, reconfiguration windows, and maintenance windows.

member.name: M:FSBS.Domain.ValueObjects.DateTimeRange.Overlaps(FSBS.Domain.ValueObjects.DateTimeRange)
member.summary: Returns true if this range shares any time with .

member.name: M:FSBS.Domain.ValueObjects.DateTimeRange.Contains(System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Returns true if falls within this range.

member.name: M:FSBS.Domain.ValueObjects.DateTimeRange.Contains(FSBS.Domain.ValueObjects.DateTimeRange)
member.summary: Returns true if falls entirely within this range.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.ValueObjects.IdempotencyKey
member.summary: A client-supplied key that guarantees exactly-once booking creation. Sourced from the Idempotency-Key HTTP header and stored as a unique index on bookings.idempotency_key.

member.name: M:FSBS.Domain.ValueObjects.IdempotencyKey.#ctor(System.Guid)
member.summary: A client-supplied key that guarantees exactly-once booking creation. Sourced from the Idempotency-Key HTTP header and stored as a unique index on bookings.idempotency_key.

member.name: T:FSBS.Domain.ValueObjects.Money
member.summary: An amount of money in a specific currency. Immutable. All monetary values in FSBS are GBP; the currency field exists to make that assumption explicit and catchable if it ever changes.

member.name: M:FSBS.Domain.ValueObjects.Money.#ctor(System.Decimal,System.String)
member.summary: An amount of money in a specific currency. Immutable. All monetary values in FSBS are GBP; the currency field exists to make that assumption explicit and catchable if it ever changes.
